title: Febreze 3Volution Plug‑In Refill Bundle 2 × 20 ml | COTTON FRESH & BLOSSOM BREEZE | OdourClear™ Plug Refills | Up to 90‑Day Continuous Freshness
features: 🔄 2‑Pack Refill Set – Cotton Fresh + Blossom & Breeze – Two complementary Febreze 3Volution plug-in oils (20 ml each)
🌿 Alternates Between 3 Scents Every 45 Minutes – Provides evolving freshness so you keep noticing the fragrance
💨 OdourClear Technology – Targets and eliminates tough lingering odours, not just masks them
⏳ Lasts Up to 90 Days per Refill – Based on average 12 hours of daily use at low setting
🔌 Compatible with Febreze 3Volution Plug Devices (Not Included) – Easy to use and designed for long-lasting performance
description: Experience evolving freshness with this Febreze 3Volution Plug-In Refill Bundle , containing two 20 ml refills in popular scents: Cotton Fresh and Blossom & Breeze . Designed for use with Febreze 3Volution plug-in units, these refills continuously cycle between three complementary scents every 45 minutes to refresh your space you keep noticing. Powered by OdourClear Technology , these refills neutralise household odours from pets, cooking, smoke, and more—rather than merely masking them. Each 20 ml refill can last up to 90 days (based on 12 hours/day on lowest setting). 2 × 20 ml Febreze 3Volution refills (Cotton Fresh & Blossom & Breeze) Alternates proprietary complementary scents every 45 minutes Neutralises tough odours at the molecular level with OdourClear Up to 90 days continuous operation per refill (at low setting) Easy-swap plug-in refills for Febreze 3Volution devices Febreze 3Volution – freshness that never gets stale.
